title: Mazars Comment: A War on Two Fronts
section_path: Mazars Comment: A War on Two Fronts
section_path_text: Mazars Comment: A War on Two Fronts
summary:
A War on Two Fronts
By George Lagarias
The old adage says: "The Fed will continue to hike until it breaks something". Most of this sentence has already become a reality. The first major casualty of the central banks' rapid hike cycle is the regional banking system in the US.
